reasoning: The primary limiter is your lactate clearance capability, as evidenced by the 9.3% decline from your 5-min to 20-min power. With your recent ride showing a lower intensity, it's essential to push slightly harder to enhance your aerobic base for the Alpine Loop ascent. This session will simulate the demands of the Sundance to Cascade Springs climb.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: Perform 6 x 6-minute intervals: 4 mins at 201-218W and 2 mins at 242-256W, 3 mins easy spin between intervals.

weekly_focus: This week: controlled return — rebuild aerobic base before pushing threshold again.
